scenarios.title: Graph RAG Development
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks that build, modify, debug, or operate LightRAG graph-based retrieval systems from Python, API, storage, parser, or provider configuration.
scenarios.role: Provides repo-specific routes and verified guidance for using LightRAG's embedded APIs, ingestion pipeline, storage backends, provider bindings, and server/WebUI surfaces.
scenarios.read_when: User mentions LightRAG, lightrag-hku, graph RAG, QueryParam, LightRAG.initialize_storages, process_options, LIGHTRAG_PARSER, lightrag-server, LightRAG WebUI, LightRAG storage classes, or LightRAG provider bindings.
scenarios.best_for: Implementing embedded LightRAG workflows, configuring API/WebUI deployments, selecting storage backends, debugging document parser/chunker behavior, wiring LLM/embedding/rerank providers, and diagnosing common LightRAG errors.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is generic RAG theory, a different RAG framework, unrelated FastAPI/React work, or paper reproduction that does not involve the LightRAG repository/package.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `lightrag` when the user names LightRAG or its concrete APIs/CLI/configs. Route through the root first, then select core-rag for embedded Python, document-pipeline for parsing/ingestion, storage-backends for persistence, llm-providers for model bindings, or api-server for REST/WebUI operation.
